sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47155" key="h(mi/leptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-λεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47155.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-hatched,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:25:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
